params.name: The Berlin Wall
params.description: A concrete scar of the Cold War, this divided city's spine became a global symbol of oppression and hope. Its fall marked not just reunification but humanity's defiant answer to ideological barricades. Today, graffiti-covered fragments scattered worldwide serve as stark reminders: walls rise, but they always fall.
